title: Handling Merge Conflicts Quiz
description: Test your knowledge on Git conflict management concepts.

questions.question: What is a 'Merge Conflict' in Git?
options: When a repository is too large
When two or more developers modify the same line of code in different branches
When a branch name is invalid

questions.question: Regarding merge conflict markers, what does 'HEAD' represent?
Which Git command is used to move the resolved version of a file from the staging area into a merge commit?
What is the primary role of a merge conflict resolution strategy?
options: To collect and analyze data from the database
To choose which version of the codebase to keep or blend together
To restart the development from scratch
